title: FraudDetectionDataset
description: Schema for the fraud detection federated learning dataset. Used by the daemon to validate training data before each round (Requirement 19.2).

features.name: distance_from_home_km
features.description: Distance from cardholder home address in km (null for card-not-present)

features.name: velocity_1h
features.description: Number of transactions in the past hour on the same card

features.name: velocity_24h
features.description: Number of transactions in the past 24 hours on the same card

features.name: card_present
features.description: Whether the physical card was present at the terminal

features.name: online_transaction
features.description: Whether this was an online/e-commerce transaction

features.name: account_age_days
features.description: Age of the card account in days
